2604.26170.title: EvoSelect: Data-Efficient LLM Evolution for Targeted Task Adaptation
2604.26170.paper_summary: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to a targeted task efficiently and effectively remains a fundamental challenge. Such adaptation often requires iteratively improving the model toward a targeted task, yet collecting high-quality human-labeled data to support this process is costly and difficult to scale. As a result, synthetic data generation has emerged as a flexible and scalable alternative. One straightforward approach is through an iterative generation-training loop, where candidate data are synthesized through an external generator, the model is updated using these data and the process is repeated over iterations. However, generated samples can be noisy, highly redundant, or even misaligned with the targeted task distribution. Training indiscriminately on such data can dilute useful learning signals and even degrade model performance. To address this, we introduce a refined paradigm, namely an iterative generation-selection-training loop, which incorporates a selection step prior to model updates. Building on this paradigm, we propose EvoSelect, a data-efficient framework to evolve LLM effectively. Given candidate samples produced by the data generator, EvoSelect selects training data by jointly modeling targeted task alignment and diversity. We estimate task relevance through optimal transport with proxy gradient representations, which quantifies how well candidate samples align with the targeted task distribution. To mitigate redundancy, we incorporate a diversification mechanism that promotes coverage of complementary training samples. By interleaving alignment and diversification, EvoSelect enables progressive LLM evolution toward targeted tasks. Extensive experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate that with either weak or strong data generators, EvoSelect consistently improves adaptation efficacy over existing data selection methods.
2604.26170.paper_summary_zh: 適應大型語言模型（LLMs）以有效且高效地完成特定任務仍然是一項基本挑戰。這種適應通常需要不斷改進模型以達成目標任務，但收集高質量的人類標註數據來支持這一過程既昂貴又難以擴展。因此，合成數據生成已成為一種靈活且可擴展的替代方案。一種簡單的方法是通過迭代生成-訓練循環，其中候選數據通過外部生成器合成，然後使用這些數據更新模型，並在多次迭代中重複此過程。然而，生成的樣本可能會嘈雜、高度冗餘，甚至與目標任務分佈不一致。對這些數據進行不加選擇的訓練可能會稀釋有用的學習信號，甚至降低模型性能。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了一個精煉的範式，即迭代生成-選擇-訓練循環，該循環在模型更新之前包含選擇步驟。在這一範式的基礎上，我們提出了EvoSelect，一個高效的數據框架，以有效地演化LLM。針對數據生成器產生的候選樣本，EvoSelect通過聯合建模目標任務的對齊和多樣性來選擇訓練數據。我們通過最佳傳輸和代理梯度表示來估計任務相關性，這量化了候選樣本與目標任務分佈的對齊程度。為了減少冗餘，我們引入了一種多樣化機制，以促進互補訓練樣本的覆蓋。通過交替進行對齊和多樣化，EvoSelect使得LLM能夠逐步演化以適應目標任務。在各種基準上的廣泛實驗表明，無論是弱數據生成器還是強數據生成器，EvoSelect始終能夠提高適應效率，超越現有的數據選擇方法。
2604.26170.author: Ting-Wei Li et.al.
2604.26170.authors: Ting-Wei Li, Sirui Chen, Jiaru Zou, Yingbing Huang, Tianxin Wei, Jingrui He, Hanghang Tong
